# EOS Laboratories

> Manufacturer of ready-to-use and dehydrated microbiology culture media,
> antibiotic susceptibility discs, transport systems and laboratory
> consumables for clinical, pharmaceutical, food, industrial, veterinary
> and research laboratories. Based in Mumbai, India. ISO 9001 & ISO 13485.
> Tagline: Precision. Quality. Trust. Pricing is available on request only.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://eoslab.in/index.html): Company overview and product portfolio.
- [About](https://eoslab.in/about.html): Manufacturer profile, quality systems, brand values.
- [Products](https://eoslab.in/products.html): Full catalogue (550+ references) with category, subcategory and media-type filtering.
- [Manufacturing](https://eoslab.in/manufacturing.html): Six-stage manufacturing process and controlled environments.
- [Quality & Compliance](https://eoslab.in/quality.html): Certifications and documentation (COA, SDS, IFU, TDS).
- [Industries](https://eoslab.in/industries.html): Clinical, pharmaceutical, food, water, veterinary, research solutions.
- [Document Requests](https://eoslab.in/downloads.html): Request COA, SDS, catalogues and technical documents.
- [Request a Quote](https://eoslab.in/request-a-quote.html): Enquiry form (pricing on request).
- [Contact](https://eoslab.in/contact.html): eoslab@yahoo.com, +91 9892652032.

## Product categories
- Ready-to-Use Culture Media (products.html?cat=rtu)
- Dehydrated Culture Media (products.html?cat=dcm)
- Antibiotic Susceptibility Testing (products.html?cat=ast)

## Notes
- No prices are published anywhere; all pricing is quoted on request.
- Individual product pages: products.html?p=CODE
